---
title: Welcome to Unit 3
subtitle: Unit 3, Lesson 1
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

<!-- This is an unreviewed AI draft -->

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Quick Links

| Practice | Primer | Slides | Examples | Lecture Notes | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|--------|----------|---------------|-------------|
|   |   | [🧑‍🏫](../lecture_slides/slidex_x.qmd) | [📓]({{< var example_base >}}x_x.ipynb "Opens in Google Colab - See README if broken") | [📋](../lecture_notesx_x.qmd) | [➡️](lessonx_x.qmd) |

## Before Class

| Practice | Primer | Previous Lesson |
|----------|--------|-------------|
|   |   | [⬅️](lessonx_x.qmd) |

## After Class

| Practice | Primer | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| [🏃‍♂️‍➡️](../practice/practicex_x.qmd) | [🌱](../primers/primerx_x.qmd) | [➡️](lessonx_x.qmd) |

:::

# Outcomes

- Review lessons learned from diagnostics unit
- Inspire students to exercise their agency in the development of agents
- Articulate clearly what makes an agent "good"
- Overview of Unit 3

# Preparation

Finish [Unit 2 project](project 2 link)

# Discussion

1. Report on work accomplished
2. Key takeaways
3. Questions unaddressed
4. Optional discussion questions
<!-- Discussion questions related to the preparation material in sub bullet points such as:
    - Question 1
    - Question 2
    - Question 3
-->
5. Log partner's contribution

# Class

<!-- Bulk of the content -->
<!-- Consists of activities, lecture material, and instruction -->
<!-- This is open ended, but has a clear flow from one lecture/activity to another -->

<!-- Activity instructions have very clear and readable directions -->
<!-- Include various content types including code, visualizations, Colab links -->
<!-- Use callout notes to aid in readability -->

# Before next class

<!-- Instructions, including any prep work, finishing class work, project work, or a practice homework -->

| Practice | Primer | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| [🏃‍♂️‍➡️](../practice/practicex_x.qmd) | [🌱](../primer/primerx_x.qmd) | ➡️(lessonx_x.qmd) |
